[20CIt is written in the Book of Camaxtli:

[9Clqqqqqqqqq[5CAfter the Creation, the cruel god Moloch rebelled
[9Cx~~~~~~~~~[5Cagainst the authority of Marduk the Creator.
[9Cx~~~~~~~~~[5CMoloch stole from Marduk the most powerful of all
[9Cx~~~~~~~~~[5Cthe artifacts of the gods, the Amulet of Yendor,
[9C~~[97mf[39m~~~~~~~[5Cand he hid it in the dark cavities of Gehennom, the
[9Cx[97m@[39m~~~~~~~~[5CUnder World, where he now lurks, and bides his time.
[9Cmqqq qqqqq
[20CYour god Camaxtli seeks to possess the Amulet, and with it
[20Cto gain deserved ascendance over the other gods.

[20CYou, a newly trained Digger, have been heralded
[20Cfrom birth as the instrument of Camaxtli.  You are destined
[20Cto recover the Amulet for your deity, or die in the
[20Cattempt.  Your hour of destiny has come.  For the sake
[20Cof us all:  Go bravely with Camaxtli!
